sentence_reviews.text: Adaptive optimizers such as AdaGrad, RMSProp, Adam, and Adafactor rescale parameter updates using running first- and second-moment statistics.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8.5 adaptive learning rates, including AdaGrad, RMSProp, and Adam.
sentence_reviews.notes: AdaGrad, RMSProp, and Adam are supported as adaptive methods; Adafactor postdates the textbook and is not directly supported. AdaGrad/RMSProp do not all use both first- and second-moment statistics in the same way.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers is to connect SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization, Statistics & experimental design to downstream capabilities including Learning-rate schedules, warmup & stabilization.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8 optimization, momentum, adaptive learning-rate methods, and strategies for optimization.
sentence_reviews.notes: The SGD/momentum and learning-rate/adaptive optimizer connection is supported. Statistics/experimental design, Adafactor, and warmup/stabilization are not directly established by the cited packet source.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Learning-rate schedules, warmup & stabilization
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8.5 adaptive learning rates and Chapter 8 optimization strategies.
sentence_reviews.notes: Adaptive learning rates and optimization strategies are supported, but warmup and the full stabilization category are not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8.3 momentum and Chapter 8.5 adaptive learning-rate algorithms.
sentence_reviews.notes: Adaptive methods are presented in the context of stochastic gradient optimization and momentum-like methods; the wording is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization, Statistics & experimental design.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapters 5, 8, and 11 on generalization, optimization, hyperparameters, and methodology.
sentence_reviews.notes: Hyperparameter and optimization sensitivity are supported. Data quality, compute budget, random variation, evaluation contamination, and the statistics/experimental-design dependency are not directly established for this node.

sentence_reviews.text: Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers uses SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8.5 adaptive learning rates in the broader stochastic optimization chapter.
sentence_reviews.notes: Adaptive optimizers are variants of gradient-based stochastic optimization; Adafactor remains unsupported by this source.

sentence_reviews.text: Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers uses Statistics & experimental design as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8.5 descriptions of accumulated squared gradients and moment estimates.
sentence_reviews.notes: Running averages/moment-like quantities are statistical in flavor, but experimental design is not directly supported as an ingredient.

sentence_reviews.text: Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers uses Numerical analysis as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8 optimization algorithms and numerical issues in training.
sentence_reviews.notes: Optimization algorithms for parameter updates involve numerical computation; the exact numerical-analysis dependency is synthesized.

edge_reviews.notes: Adaptive optimizers build on stochastic gradient optimization; core strength is defensible, though Adafactor is not in the cited source.
Moment/accumulator estimates support a statistics connection, but experimental design is not shown as a core dependency.
Adaptive parameter updates are numerical optimization procedures; common strength is defensible.
